title: Finish #1035 ordinary output slices

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Complete the remaining GitHub #1035 ordinary-output slices on branch codex/implement-p1-candidates, one output at a time.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep scope bounded to ordinary JSON output compression and regression tests for implement, summary, preflight, proof, report, Planning report/summary, and Memory report/promotion-report. Preserve selector/verbose detail and do not hide blockers, proof requirements, required skills, or continuation owners.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: The smallest compatible payload reshaping and tests needed per command, while stopping if a command requires broader schema migration.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Implement and validate the remaining #1035 outputs one at a time, starting with implement --format json.
proof_expectations: For each slice, add or run a focused regression asserting one primary decision/action object and bounded top-level fields.
Run the relevant command test module after each slice.
Before closeout run make test-workspace, make test-planning, make test-memory, and the AW planning health checks if all touched modules require it.
completion_criteria: Each remaining #1035 ordinary output has one primary decision/action object or an explicit equivalent primary status.
Top-level allowlist regressions prevent reintroducing competing decision fields.
Selector or verbose routes preserve detailed diagnostics.
#1035 can be closed honestly after validation.
canonical_core.continuation_owner: none; GitHub #1035 is closable by this branch

non_goals: Leave adjacent backlog or follow-on work out of this plan.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: Workspace output builders/tests, Planning tiny report/summary builders/tests, Memory tiny report/promotion-report builders/tests, and Planning state/provenance/active plan surfaces.

execution_bounds.stop before touching: Generated command runtime, unrelated codegen lanes, unrelated P2/P3 roadmap items, or non-ordinary host-repo behavior.
